title: 1 killed, 5 injured in shooting at Mall of Louisiana food court
summary_full: A shooting at the Mall of Louisiana in Baton Rouge has claimed one life and injured five. The incident occurred in the food court following a confrontation between two groups. Police have taken five individuals into custody and confirmed there is no ongoing threat. Shoppers and employees scrambled for safety during the chaos.
